CancelTrainedModel.description: Grants permission to cancel a trained model

CancelTrainedModelInferenceJob.description: Grants permission to cancel a trained model inference job

CreateAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to create an audience model

CreateConfiguredAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to create a configured audience model

CreateConfiguredModelAlgorithm.description: Grants permission to create a configured model algorithm

CreateConfiguredModelAlgorithmAssociatio.description: Grants permission to create a configured model algorithm association

CreateMLInputChannel.description: Grants permission to create an ML input channel

CreateTrainedModel.description: Grants permission to create a trained model

CreateTrainingDataset.description: Grants permission to create a training dataset, or seed audience. In Clean Rooms ML, the TrainingDataset is metadata that points to a Glue table, which is read only during AudienceModel creation

DeleteAudienceGenerationJob.description: Grants permission to delete the specified audience generation job, and removes all data associated with the job

DeleteAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to delete the specified audience generation job, and removes all data associated with the job

DeleteConfiguredAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to delete the specified configured audience model

DeleteConfiguredAudienceModelPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the specified configured audience model policy

DeleteConfiguredModelAlgorithm.description: Grants permission to delete a configured model algorithm

DeleteConfiguredModelAlgorithmAssociatio.description: Grants permission to delete a configured model algorithm association

DeleteMLConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an ML configuration

DeleteMLInputChannelData.description: Grants permission to delete all data associated with the ML input channel

DeleteTrainedModelOutput.description: Grants permission to delete all output associated with the trained model

DeleteTrainingDataset.description: Grants permission to delete a training dataset

GetAudienceGenerationJob.description: Grants permission to return information about an audience generation job

GetAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to return information about an audience model

GetCollaborationConfiguredModelAlgorithm.description: Grants permission to return information about a configured model algorithm association created by any member in the collaboration

GetCollaborationMLInputChannel.description: Grants permission to return information about an ML input channel created by any member in the collaboration

GetCollaborationTrainedModel.description: Grants permission to return information about a trained model created by any member in the collaboration

GetConfiguredAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to return information about a configured audience model

GetConfiguredAudienceModelPolicy.description: Grants permission to return information about a configured audience model policy

GetConfiguredModelAlgorithm.description: Grants permission to return information about a configured model algorithm

GetConfiguredModelAlgorithmAssociation.description: Grants permission to return information about a configured model algorithm association

GetMLConfiguration.description: Grants permission to return information about an ML configuration

GetMLInputChannel.description: Grants permission to return information about an ML input channel

GetTrainedModel.description: Grants permission to return information about a trained model

GetTrainedModelInferenceJob.description: Grants permission to return information about a trained model inference job

GetTrainingDataset.description: Grants permission to return information about a training dataset

ListAudienceExportJobs.description: Grants permission to return a list of the audience export jobs

ListAudienceGenerationJobs.description: Grants permission to return a list of audience generation jobs

ListAudienceModels.description: Grants permission to return a list of audience models

ListCollaborationConfiguredModelAlgorith.description: Grants permission to return a list of configured model algorithms created by any member in the collaboration

ListCollaborationMLInputChannels.description: Grants permission to return a list of ML input channels created by any member in the collaboration

ListCollaborationTrainedModelExportJobs.description: Grants permission to return a list of trained model export jobs started by any member in the collaboration

ListCollaborationTrainedModelInferenceJo.description: Grants permission to return a list of trained model inference jobs started by any member in the collaboration

ListCollaborationTrainedModels.description: Grants permission to return a list of trained models created by any member in the collaboration

ListConfiguredAudienceModels.description: Grants permission to return a list of configured audience models

ListConfiguredModelAlgorithmAssociations.description: Grants permission to return a list of configured model algorithm associations

ListConfiguredModelAlgorithms.description: Grants permission to return a list of configured model algorithms

ListMLInputChannels.description: Grants permission to return a list of ML input channels

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to return a list of tags for a provided resource

ListTrainedModelInferenceJobs.description: Grants permission to return a list of trained model inference jobs

ListTrainedModelVersions.description: Grants permission to return a list of trained model versions

ListTrainedModels.description: Grants permission to return a list of trained models

ListTrainingDatasets.description: Grants permission to return a list of training datasets

PutConfiguredAudienceModelPolicy.description: Grants permission to create or update the resource policy for a configured audience model

PutMLConfiguration.description: Grants permission to put an ML configuration

StartAudienceExportJob.description: Grants permission to export an audience of a specified size after you have generated an audience

StartAudienceGenerationJob.description: Grants permission to start the audience generation job

StartTrainedModelExportJob.description: Grants permission to start a trained model export job

StartTrainedModelInferenceJob.description: Grants permission to start a trained model inference job

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a specific resource

UnTagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a specific resource

UpdateConfiguredAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to update a configured audience model.

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request

cleanrooms-ml:CollaborationId.description: Filters access by Clean rooms collaboration id
